title: Explosion damages Jewish school in Amsterdam; mayor calls it targeted attack
summary_full: An explosion rocked a Jewish school in Amsterdam, with the mayor suspecting a targeted attack on the community. This follows a similar incident at a Rotterdam synagogue, where arson is suspected. Authorities detained teenagers near another synagogue. An Islamist group has claimed responsibility for both Dutch incidents and a prior attack in Belgium, raising concerns.
